RegLoan Bank — Income / Bank Statement Verification Document VER-0003 Page 3 of 5 Statement of Account — continued Date Description Debit ($) Credit ($) Balance ($) 09/09/2025 UTILITY BILL - 1,722 7,509 22/04/2025 UTILITY BILL 543 - 6,966 25/12/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 898 - 6,068 10/08/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 845 2,231 7,454 12/10/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 7,454 02/11/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT - 1,172 8,626 11/01/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 8,626 05/11/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 428 572 8,770 07/06/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - 475 9,245 09/12/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - 872 10,117 26/10/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - - 10,117 18/07/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 683 - 9,434 09/12/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 147 - 9,287 15/03/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 724 2,303 10,866 18/04/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 10,866 10/11/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT - - 10,866 20/06/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 728 - 10,138 24/10/2025 UTILITY BILL 340 1,377 11,175 Stip cleared
